queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Analyze the statistical impact of having no checking account on increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: between 4 and 7 years.
queries.question: Examine the determinants of credit risk mitigation associated with present employment duration between four and seven years.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Assess the statistical impact of checking account balances below zero on the reduction of credit risk exposure.
